title: General Dentistry * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > General Dentistry * Native American Community 5 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS HEALTH OFFICES HEALTHCARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers primary care, dental, radiology, optometry, mental health, and lab services. Also offers medical care related to domestic violence and sexual assault. 200 Gwee-Shut Road Siletz, OR 97380 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members, children of tribal members, and the general public. Dental care for tribal members only. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-5pm, Friday 10am-5pm (541) 444-1030 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE COOS, LOWER UMPQUA, AND SIUSLAW INDIANS THREE RIVERS DENTAL CLINIC COOS BAY DENTAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pediatric and general dental services, including cleanings, fillings, crowns, bridges, dentures, root canals, treatment planning, and extractions. 1245 Fulton Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Enrolled members of federally recognized Indian Tribes Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm (541) 888-6433 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GRAND RONDE HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER DENTAL CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers general dental care including dental restorations. 9615 Grand Ronde Road Grand Ronde, OR 97347 Eligibility: Members of any federally recognized tribe or spouse of Grand Ronde Tribal member. Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm, Thursday 9:30am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm Email (503) 879-2020 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST NARA NW DENTAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive dental care. 12750 SE Stark Street Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as Native American or Alaskan Native Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-6pm Email (971) 347-3009 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive physical, mental, and dental care services. Services include general exams, well-child exams, immunizations, care for illness or infections, prenatal care, comprehensive dental services, and counseling and drug and alcohol treatment services. 46314 Timine Way Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members or children of tribal members Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm Email (541) 966-9830 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS HEALTHCARE SERVICES CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE COOS, LOWER UMPQUA, AND SIUSLAW INDIANS DENTAL CLINIC GRAND RONDE HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER DENTAL CARE SERVICES NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST NARA NW DENTAL CLINIC YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER
